title: tetraneuris argentea var. thoreauensis
intro: Tetraneuris argentea var. thoreauensis, also known as Silverstem Gumweed or Silverstem, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that grows in the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is said to have medicinal properties in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Tetraneuris argentea var. thoreauensis is often made into a tea or tincture to be used as a treatment for various ailments.
